# Sprint 7.1 Quantitative Results

**Project:** urban-parking-optimization-system
**Sprint:** Sprint 7. Final Outcomes
**Objective:** Evaluate the quantitative results and strategic value of the Urban Parking Optimization System after six months of deployment.

## Description
Evaluate the quantitative results, including average parking search time reduction, annualized parking revenue increase, and downtown CO2 emissions reduction.

## Deliverable
Quantitative results report
